goal: Build a single-peg insertion task: 1 cylindrical peg (5mm clearance), 1 hole, robot picks peg from feeder and inserts. Force-threshold-gated insertion (APPROACH→ALIGN→INSERT). Realizes Phase 8 yrkesroll #5 (contact-rich Isaac Lab Factory PegInsert pattern, simplified to single-peg).
thoughts: Single peg simplifies CP-58's array case. Forces multi-cube fix not needed — gate evaluates one peg.
Peg = cylinder, hole = xform marker on panel surface. Tolerance 0.005m (5mm clearance per Factory).
Force-torque sensor on panda_hand at threshold=5.0N detects contact. APPROACH (free-air to xy of hole, h=0.10m above) → ALIGN (descend until z near hole_z) → INSERT (final 5mm).
Without contact-aware planner, this canonical tests: (1) controller picks peg and reaches hole xy, (2) peg ends at hole xy ± tolerance + z_floor + above_floor.
Phase 9 Top 6-15 would add: tactile sensor, soft fixture, defect detection on insertion failure.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Peg feeder belt
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.15, 0, 0],
)

# Single peg
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Peg_1", prim_type="Cylinder", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.835], radius=0.018, height=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Peg_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Peg_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Peg_1", material_name="rubber")

# Hole panel (wider than CP-58 — single peg, no array crowding)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/HolePanel", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.20, 0.15, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/HolePanel", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Single hole at panel center
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Hole_1", prim_type="Xform", position=[0, -0.4, 0.825])
setup_assembly_constraint(
    peg_path="/World/Peg_1",
    hole_path="/World/Hole_1",
    tolerance=0.005,
)

# Force/torque sensor — Factory PegInsert pattern: 5N threshold for contact detection
add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/Franka/FtSensor",
    parent_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    threshold=5.0,
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Drop precisely at hole xy + above hole z
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Peg_1", "/World/HolePanel", "/World/Hole_1"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Peg_1"],
    destination_path="/World/HolePanel",
    drop_target=[0, -0.4, 0.825],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/HolePanel"],
)
extension_notes: Single-peg variant of CP-58. CP-58 was 4-peg array; this isolates the insertion physics for testing tolerance+force-gate without inter-peg interference. Direct port of Isaac Lab Factory PegInsert (single instance).
failure_modes: Peg slides off panel edge during release — same risk as CP-58. HolePanel is 0.30x0.30 (15cm half-extent each side), hole at center, plenty of margin.
Force-torque threshold doesn't gate insertion — controller doesn't yet read FT sensor. Insertion happens by trajectory, not force.
Peg orientation: cylindrical, no need for orientation-gating. Multi-peg array (CP-58) would need orientation per hole.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; build OK, gate stable_fail (PhysX numerical instability during grip — cube velocity blows to >200km/s)

migration_deferred.details: Single-peg precision insertion (5mm clearance); force-compliance insertion has no match in {pick_place, sort, reorient, navigate}
